name: Frank Proto
abstract: Frank Proto (born July 18, 1941 in Brooklyn, New York) is an American composer and bassist who graduated from the Manhattan School of Music in 1966 with a Master of Music.

works_created.t: Doodles: An Introduction to the Orchestra
A Portrait of George: Gershwin on Broadway and in Hollywood

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Moore
about_quotes.evidence: I studied with Frank Proto in Cincinnati, who had just come from New York and joined the orchestra there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Moore interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997
